html:
Exclusive to:  

Boards are Refined Items crafted with 4 Logs used in the construction of various items and structures. A Science Machine is required to prototype them. Boards are also highly flammable and can be used as Fuel. Boards can be directly used to repair Boats.

Due to the fact that 4 Logs refine into 1 Board, and Boards stack up to 10 (40 logs), it is more efficient to carry a single stack of Boards than two stacks of 20 Logs. One can also store more wood in a container if they convert them to Boards. It must be noted, however, that Boards cannot be used in recipes that require logs, such as Campfires.

Exclusive to:
“Boards.”
–Wilson
“Boards. They'll burn, same as other wood.”
–Willow
“I break log to make board!”
–Wolfgang
“Even scarier for the trees.”
–Wendy
“THEY ARE FLATTER NOW”
–WX-78
“Roughly hewn wood boards.”
–Wickerbottom
“So smooth. You can really see the grain.”
–Woodie
“Roughly hewn.”
–Maxwell
“Board fabrication without planing tools! Extraordinary!”
–Wagstaff
“Grandfather lögs.”
–Wigfrid
“Logs, but flat.”
–Webber
“Not much surf in these boards.”
–Walani
“Sigh. It would be so perfect for grilling salmon.”
–Warly
“Good n' straight.”
–Woodlegs
“'TIS WOOD”
–Wilba
“Fallen friends”
–Wormwood
“I'd be board too, if I just lay around all day.”
–Wheeler
“Oh, the possibilities.”
–Winona
“It's a board. How untoward!”
–Wortox
“Tree pieces for building, florp.”
–Wurt
“Some boards.”
–Walter
“I'm already bored of looking at them.”
–Wanda
Boards are Refined Items crafted with 4 Logs used in the construction of various items and structures. A Science Machine is required to prototype them. Boards are also highly flammable and can be used as Fuel. Boards can be directly used to repair Boats.
Due to the fact that 4 Logs refine into 1 Board, and Boards stack up to 10 (40 logs), it is more efficient to carry a single stack of Boards than two stacks of 20 Logs. One can also store more wood in a container if they convert them to Boards. It must be noted, however, that Boards cannot be used in recipes that require logs, such as Campfires.
